---
title: "Welcome to BoredEngineer"
toc: false
# toc-location: left
---

<div id="particles-js" style="position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: -1;"></div>

<script src="/particles.js"></script>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  function getParticlesConfig() {
    const isDark = document.body.classList.contains('quarto-dark');
    
    // Exact behavior from networksciencebook.com
    // with color adjustments for light/dark visibility
    return {
      "particles": {
        "number": {
          "value": 80,
          "density": {
            "enable": true,
            "value_area": 800
          }
        },
        "color": {
          "value": isDark ? "#ffffff" : "#3d95ce"
        },
        "shape": {
          "type": "circle",
          "stroke": {
            "width": 0,
            "color": "#000000"
          }
        },
        "opacity": {
          "value": 0.6,
          "random": false,
          "anim": {
            "enable": false,
            "speed": 1,
            "opacity_min": 0.1,
            "sync": false
          }
        },
        "size": {
          "value": 4,
          "random": true,
          "anim": {
            "enable": false,
            "speed": 40,
            "size_min": 0.1,
            "sync": false
          }
        },
        "line_linked": {
          "enable": true,
          "distance": 150,
          "color": isDark ? "#ffffff" : "#3d95ce",
          "opacity": 0.5,
          "width": 1
        },
        "move": {
          "enable": true,
          "speed": 0.6,
          "direction": "top",
          "random": false,
          "straight": false,
          "out_mode": "out",
          "bounce": false,
          "attract": {
            "enable": true,
            "rotateX": 710,
            "rotateY": 1200
          }
        }
      },
      "interactivity": {
        "detect_on": "canvas",
        "events": {
          "onhover": {
            "enable": true,
            "mode": "repulse"
          },
          "onclick": {
            "enable": true,
            "mode": "push"
          },
          "resize": true
        },
        "modes": {
          "grab": {
            "distance": 400,
            "line_linked": {
              "opacity": 1
            }
          },
          "bubble": {
            "distance": 400,
            "size": 40,
            "duration": 2,
            "opacity": 8,
            "speed": 3
          },
          "repulse": {
            "distance": 100,
            "duration": 0.4
          },
          "push": {
            "particles_nb": 4
          }
        }
      },
      "retina_detect": true
    };
  }

  function initParticles() {
    const config = getParticlesConfig();
    particlesJS('particles-js', config);
  }

  // Initial init
  initParticles();

  // Watch for theme changes
  const observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
    mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
      if (mutation.type === 'attributes' && mutation.attributeName === 'class') {
        // We re-init to apply new colors
        initParticles();
      }
    });
  });

  observer.observe(document.body, {
    attributes: true,
    attributeFilter: ['class']
  });
});
</script>

::: {.column-screen .hero-content style="text-align: center; padding-top: 5vh; background: transparent;"}

::: {.glass-container}
![](files/images/goat_conf1_renan.png)
:::

:::
